About SBI Small Cap Fund
The SBI Small Cap Fund is an equity mutual fund from SBI Mutual Fund that invests primarily in a diversified portfolio of small-cap company stocks for long-term growth. It uses a bottom-up strategy to select stocks and can invest up to 35% of its assets in other equities (including large and mid-cap) or debt ins
